prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次约22692→2776→1724→2018→2224名。2021年位次异常偏高（可能受当年招生模式影响），2022年起稳定在1700–2800名区间；近3年（2023–2025）位次在1724–2224之间小幅波动，2025年基准约2224名；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年74人、2022年74人、2023年80人、2024年81人、2025年81人，呈小幅递增趋势；2026年计划大幅扩招至126人，较2025年增加45人（增幅约55.6%），扩招幅度显著，预计将明显拉低竞争门槛，使最低录取位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第13名（Top20），近年排名稳定在11–13名区间，属于全国顶尖综合性大学，对高分考生持续保持强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及多起学术不端事件（论文数据造假等），11条事件中7条负面；2025年声誉评价为偏正面（学校回应舆情积极）；抖音热度排名第29（较热），综合热度约142万，关注度中等偏上；历史投档异常方面，2022年多省爆冷断档（中关注），2023–2025年持续有低至中关注度的异常信号，可能对部分考生报考心理产生抑制；中山大学拥有A-及以上学科23个，包括生态学A+、工商管理A+、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等理工科专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与中山大学优势学科高度匹配，预计吸引大量高分考生报考；本省2026年考生总数约299000人，较2025年（物理类+历史类合计约297258人）小幅增加约0.6%，竞争略有加剧；中山大学位于广东省广州市，属于华南地区顶尖高校，对西南省份（含贵州）考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在贵州招生计划近年持续增加，2026年扩招幅度尤为显著，反映出对贵州生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2224名、2026年大幅扩招55.6%（供需弹性主值约2965名）、学校顶尖层次（软科13名）的持续吸引力、声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考热情、本省考生小幅增加等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年明显后移，但扩招带来的竞争稀释效应略被学校强吸引力部分抵消；预测最低位次约2945名，区间2609–3281名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 22692, 2776, 1724, 2018, and 2224 respectively. The 2021 ranking was abnormally high (possibly due to the enrollment model that year), while from 2022 onwards it stabilized in the 1700–2800 range; in the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated slightly between 1724 and 2224, with a baseline of about 2224 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Guizhou Province: 74 in 2021, 74 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 81 in 2024, and 81 in 2025, showing a slight increasing trend; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 126, an increase of 45 students (approximately 55.6%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion is expected to notably lower the competitive threshold, shifting the minimum admission ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 13th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 11–13 range in recent years. It is a top-tier comprehensive university in China, maintaining strong appeal for high-scoring students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving multiple academic misconduct incidents (such as paper data fabrication), with 7 negative out of 11 incidents; the 2025 reputation evaluation was slightly positive (the university responded actively to public opinion). Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.42 million, indicating moderate to high attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2022, there were cold streaks and gaps in multiple provinces (moderate attention), and from 2023 to 2025, there were continuous low to moderate attention anomaly signals, which may suppress some students' application psychology. Sun Yat-sen University has 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, closely matching Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous disciplines, and are expected to attract a large number of high-scoring applicants. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category + History Category total approximately 297,258), leading to slightly intensified competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China, exerting strong cross-provincial appeal for candidates from southwestern provinces (including Guizhou). The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou has been increasing in recent years, with a particularly significant expansion in 2026, reflecting its emphasis on Guizhou students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2224, the significant 55.6% expansion in 2026 (supply-demand elasticity main value about 2965), the sustained appeal of the university's top tier (Soft Science rank 13), the slightly negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the slight increase in provincial candidates, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift significantly backward compared to 2025. However, the competitive dilution effect from expansion is partially offset by the university's strong appeal. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2945, with a range of 2609–3281.

Candidates with rankings within 2600 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Intelligent Science and Technology, etc.); those with rankings in the 2600–3300 range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Mathematics, Economics, etc.) while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings above 3300 may consider Tier 3 majors as safety options (Physics, Environmental Science, etc.), while also paying attention to the admission opportunities brought by the expansion.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学（分化观望）、汉语言/中文（推荐）、师范/教育（分化观望）等文科专业热度分化，中山大学相关学科实力强劲，预计仍能吸引优质生源；本省2026年历史类考生估算约90597人（按近年占比约30.3%推算），较2025年90087人小幅增加约0.6%，竞争略有加剧；中山大学位于广东省广州市，对西南省份文科考生有较强跨省吸引力；2026年历史类扩招33.3%，反映出对贵州文科生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次401名、2026年扩招33.3%（供需弹性主值约481名）、学校顶尖层次的持续吸引力、声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考热情、本省历史类考生小幅增加等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约491名，区间435–547名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 385, 387, 369, 594, and 401 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized within the 369–387 range. In 2024, it anomalously shifted to 594 (possibly due to the transition to the new college entrance examination model), and rebounded to 401 in 2025. The fluctuations have been significant in the past two years, with a baseline of about 401 in 2025. The enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Guizhou Province: 30 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, showing a slight reduction followed by stabilization. In 2026, the plan expands to 32, an increase of 8 students (approximately 33.3%) compared to 2025, which is a substantial expansion and is expected to shift the minimum admission ranking downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 13th (Top 20), making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. Its liberal arts strength is also outstanding (Chinese Language and Literature A, Philosophy A-, Law A-, etc.), maintaining strong appeal for high-scoring liberal arts students. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.42 million. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were multiple cold snaps and gaps in 2022 (moderate attention), and continuous anomaly signals from 2023 to 2025, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous liberal arts disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature A, Philosophy A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, Law A-, Sociology A-, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A-, etc., covering a wide range of subjects with strong strength, attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law (differentiated wait-and-see), Chinese Language/Literature (recommended), and Teacher Training/Education (differentiated wait-and-see) show differentiated popularity. Sun Yat-sen University's related disciplines are strong and are expected to continue attracting high-quality students. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in the province is about 90,597 (based on the recent proportion of about 30.3%), a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 90,087 in 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, and has strong cross-provincial appeal for liberal arts candidates from southwestern provinces. The 33.3% expansion in the history category in 2026 reflects the university's emphasis on Guizhou's liberal arts student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 401 in 2025, the 33.3% expansion in 2026 (with a supply-demand elasticity main value of about 481), the sustained appeal of the top-tier university, the somewhat negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the slight increase in the number of history category candidates in the province, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly downward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 491, with a range of 435–547.

Candidates with rankings within 435 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Economics, Law, Chinese Language and Literature); those in the 435–550 range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Public Administration, International Politics, Foreign Languages and Literatures) while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings above 550 may consider Tier 3 majors as safety options (Philosophy, Tourism Management).
